description_long: This is a compact wooden filing cabinet with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish and a rectangular shape. The front features two spacious drawers on the right side, each with a subtle horizontal groove serving as a handle, and a large open compartment on the left, likely for legroom or additional storage. The top surface is flat and continuous, suitable for placing office items or equipment. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel featuring a small circular cutout, possibly for cable management. The construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a modern, minimalist design. This cabinet is well-suited for use in professional or home office environments, providing both storage and workspace functionality.
description: A medium-brown wooden filing cabinet with two drawers and an open compartment, featuring a flat top and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with groove handles on the right and an open compartment on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wooden panel with visible wood grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood panel with a small circular cutout near the bottom left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden panel and visible wood grain.
